title: Constant of proportionality from equations
description: Practice identifying the constant of proportionality from equations.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the constant of proportionality in the equation $y=\dfrac23x$?**

constant of proportionality $=$ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
If the **constant of proportionality** is $\greenD{k}$, then:

$\maroonD{y}=\greenD{k}\blueD{x}$

What number do we multiply by $\blueD{x}$ to get $\maroonD{y}$?
The constant of proportionality is $\greenD{\dfrac{2}{3}}$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which equation has a constant of proportionality equal to $2$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
If the **constant of proportionality** is $\greenD{k}$, then:

$\maroonD{y}=\greenD{k}\blueD{x}$

In which equation do we multiply $\blueD{x}$ by $\greenD{2}$ to get $\maroonD{y}$?
$\greenD{\dfrac{10}{5}}=\greenD{2}$
The equation $\maroonD{y}=\greenD{\dfrac{10}{5}}\blueD{x}$ has a constant of proportionality equal to $2$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which equation has a constant of proportionality equal to $10$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
If the **constant of proportionality** is $\greenD{10}$, then:

$\maroonD{y}=\greenD{10}\blueD{x}$

In which equation do we multiply $\blueD{x}$ by $\greenD{10}$ to get $\maroonD{y}$?
$\greenD{\dfrac{30}{3}}=\greenD{10}$
The equation $\maroonD{y}=\greenD{\dfrac{30}{3}}\blueD{x}$ has a constant of proportionality equal to $10$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which equation has a constant of proportionality equal to $\dfrac{1}{2}$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
If the **constant of proportionality** is $\greenD{\dfrac{1}{2}}$, then:

$\maroonD{y}=\greenD{\dfrac{1}{2}}\blueD{x}$

In which equation do we multiply $\blueD{x}$ by $\greenD{\dfrac12}$ to get $\maroonD{y}$?
$\greenD{\dfrac{3}{6}}=\greenD{\dfrac12}$
The equation $\maroonD{y}=\greenD{\dfrac{3}{6}}\blueD{x}$ has a constant of proportionality equal to $\dfrac{1}{2}$.

$\greenD{\dfrac{18}{6}}=\greenD{3}$
The equation $\maroonD{y}=\greenD{\dfrac{18}{6}}\blueD{x}$ has a constant of proportionality equal to $3$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which equation has a constant of proportionality equal to $1$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
